name: Law Offices of David W. Biles, P.C.

websiteQuality.rationale: Modern WordPress/Avada rebuild (content updated May 2025) with HTTPS, a viewport meta tag, clear 'Request A Consultation' CTAs, a Gravity Forms contact form on the homepage and contact page, and strong Denton/North Texas local positioning. However it shows no online booking widget, no visible review/rating badges or board-certification trust signals, and publishes no street address ('appointment only'). Technical polish is mixed: the homepage title tag is malformed (leading '- '), multiple H1s appear on one page, and several images ship with empty alt attributes.

factors.mobileUsability: Viewport meta tag present and responsive Avada theme with srcset images; mobile-ready.
factors.pageSpeed: Not directly measured (no lab tooling). Inference: heavyweight page — 115 script tags and 77 external JS files from Avada, Gravity Forms, and Yoast — suggesting mediocre load performance despite image srcset optimization.
factors.accessibility: Several content images have empty alt attributes (alt with no value); multiple H1 headings on the homepage; logo does carry descriptive alt text.
factors.visualCredibility: Clean, recently updated (2025) design with current photography and dynamic copyright year; professional but generic stock imagery.
factors.navigation: Simple, clear top nav: Home, Firm Overview, Attorney Profile, Probate, Estate Planning, Wills and Powers of Attorney, Contact.
factors.contentClarity: Plain-language explanations of estate planning and probate services aimed at families; consistent 30+ years experience messaging.
factors.callsToAction: Repeated phone number in header and body, 'Request A Consultation' buttons, and 'Schedule a consultation today' prompts on every page.
factors.contactFormQuality: Gravity Forms contact form (name, phone, email, message) embedded on homepage and contact page; functional and prominent.
factors.localPositioning: Strong: 'Denton' in title tags, headings, and copy; 'serving clients across North Texas'; offices by appointment only.
factors.trustSignals: Weak on-site: no displayed Super Lawyers/Avvo badges, no client reviews or testimonials, no board certifications shown; attorney quote and 30+ years claims only.
factors.appointmentBooking: No online scheduling widget (no Calendly/Acuity); consultations requested via form or phone; video conferences offered.

sources.supports: firm name; phone (940) 566-0566; estate planning/probate/wills and powers of attorney/family law practice areas; 30+ years experience claims; website quality assessment

notes: Self-described boutique, solo practice of David W. Biles. Site's primary positioning is estate planning/probate; family law still appears in homepage headings and in Super Lawyers/Justia profiles, suggesting a legacy practice area. Firm name appears with both 'P.C.' and 'PC' styling. No notable case coverage found in public news or court sources.
